name: Goodbye for now
description:
Hello it’s been a while but I might as I will tell the truth I’m probably not gonna on this site for a while I know it’s kinda stupid to say something like that it’s better to update you guys instead of just ghosting

Also I’m deeply sorry for the people who requested the bots but but still never got them still disappointed In myself for not finishing that before I left.

but I also would like say thanks for the 1800 followers even when I’m gone I’m still getting followers is honestly very surprising to me♡♡
creator: Ses_monkey2
